subject: fix(structure): keep cell selection in same section after cell deletion
body:
When deleting the last cell in a section, selection now stays in the same
section (selects previous cell) instead of jumping to the next section.
If the deleted cell wasn't the last in its section, selection moves to
the next cell (shifted to same index), which is the standard behavior.

Verified all cell grid components (MiniCellGrid, ContextBar CellGrid,
CanvasCellOverlay) correctly rebuild from layout.structure and highlight
selectedCell consistently after insert/delete/move/swap operations.

Tags: structure, layout, selection, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: layout-structure-controls
Semver: patch
